name: Elvis Costello
abstract: Declan Patrick MacManus (born 25 August 1954), known professionally as Elvis Costello, is an English singer, songwriter, record producer, author, and television host. According to Rolling Stone, Costello "reinvigorated the literate, lyrical traditions of Bob Dylan and Van Morrison with the raw energy and sass that were principal ethics o…

about_quotes.speaker: Tom Lellis
about_quotes.evidence: I mean it goes from Bruce Springsteen to Elvis Costello and I think these people are frauds.
about_quotes.doc_title: Tom Lellis interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, July 31, 2007

about_quotes.speaker: Chris Parker
about_quotes.evidence: there were a lot of people like Leo Sayer or Eric Clapton or Elvis Costello or Linda Ronstadt... where they didn’t have a band so they used a put together band from New York or they used certain members of the Saturday Night band itself to do their performance.
about_quotes.doc_title: Chris Parker interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, January 5, 2023

about_quotes.speaker: Giacomo Gates
about_quotes.evidence: Babs Gonsales, an Elvis Costello tune — that’s not esoteric but for me to include Elvis Costello’s music what I do to me is a stretch.
about_quotes.doc_title: Giacomo Gates interviewed by Monk Rowe, Utica, New York, March 29, 2015 [interview 1 of 2]

about_quotes.speaker: Jake Hanna
about_quotes.evidence: You know this guy Elvis Costello? ... It’s got Chet Baker with Elvis Costello.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jake Hanna interviewed by Monk Rowe, Aspen, Colorado, October 11, 1997

about_quotes.speaker: Ken Peplowski
about_quotes.evidence: Elvis Costello I like. You know I listen to all kinds of pop music.
about_quotes.doc_title: Ken Peplowski interviewed by Monk Rowe, Aspen, Colorado, October 10, 1997 [interview 1 of 2]

about_quotes.speaker: Phoebe Jacobs and Jackie Harris
about_quotes.evidence: [INTERVIEWEE] Look at Elvis Costello, what he’s doing with this.
about_quotes.doc_title: Phoebe Jacobs and Jackie Harris interviewed by Monk Rowe, Rome, New York, August 21, 2006
